commitments.task: Set up Clive web UI for remote access — nginx reverse proxy on VPS so David can access http://clive.yourdomain.com (or VPS IP) from any browser. Auth token already set. Alternative: SSH tunnel from laptop using different port (18790) if no domain. Don't do this from Mac mini — port 18789 conflict with Claudia.
commitments.notes: 2026-02-23: David asked about this, deferred to another day. VPS gateway binds 127.0.0.1:18789 only (gateway.mode=local). Options: (1) nginx proxy — apt install nginx + config; (2) SSH tunnel from laptop: ssh -N -L 18790:127.0.0.1:18789 root@72.62.213.83 -i ~/.ssh/clive_vps_ed25519 then open localhost:18790. cloudflared installed on Mac mini if quick tunnel needed again.

commitments.title: Test candidate models before adding to fallback chain
commitments.description: Before deepseek-chat, mistral-small, or any untested model is added to either bot's fallback chain: run a dedicated test session in Discord to evaluate response quality, verbosity, rule-following, and behaviour consistency. Only promote to fallback after passing. Current approved fallback order: gemini-3.1-pro-preview → haiku → kimi-k2.5 → mistral-large → sonnet.
commitments.notes: Models to test: deepseek-chat, mistral-small, minimax-m2.5. Test approach: give each a story/question/technical task in Discord, evaluate output quality and rule compliance.

commitments.title: Bot-in-a-Box as paid service — fallback revenue stream
commitments.description: When bandwidth allows: offer OpenClaw deployment (Bot in a Box) as paid service. £300-500 setup + £50-100/month. Target: local SMBs, estate agents, dog sitters, bookkeepers. Demo = Clive. Template exists in shared-knowledge/bots/template/. Elliot can automate VPS provisioning. This is a FALLBACK to main RL projects (DVLT partnership etc) — not a priority until David has capacity.
commitments.source: Tess conversation 2026-02-27 + RoboNuggets 336 use cases video
commitments.notes:
Full analysis at research/openclaw-money-opportunities.md. Elliot offered to script full deployment automation (provision VPS, install OpenClaw, apply template = zero manual fulfillment). Lead gen automation also possible. Park until DVLT + other RL priorities are resolved.

YouTube Intelligence Pipeline = key differentiator to bundle with Bot-in-a-Box:
- Nightly AI/automation digest from 42+ channels
- Local Ollama (free) + Gemini merge for long videos
- GPU-accelerated on Titan X (idle between videos = normal)
- --force flag for re-processing old summaries
- Output: Word doc with categorised insights (Features/Skills/Money/Integrations)
- Skill package: scripts/youtube-nightly.py + research/ folder structure + cron job
- Unique selling point: clients get AI-curated intelligence on their industry nightly, fully autonomous
